title: olearia nummulariifolia
intro: Olearia nummulariifolia, also known as the coin daisy, is a small shrub native to Australia, characterized by its white or pink flowers and coin-shaped leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Olearia nummulariifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
